SEARCH

Package commands

package commands
  • Class
    Description
    AddColumnCommand
    Command to add column to a table
    AggregateCommand
    Command class to do operations under circumstances
    CloseCommand
    Command class to close the table and database sheets and wipe all data
    CommandEnum
    Enum that contains all commands
    CommandInterface
     
    CountCommand
    Command class to do counting under circumstances
    DeleteCommand
    Command class to delete rows under circumstances
    DescribeCommand
    Command class to do describe what types each column uses
    ExitCommand
    Command class exit the program
    ExportCommand
    Command class to export a file
    HelpCommand
    Command class to pull up the help menu
    ImportCommand
    Command class to import a table into database
    InnerJoinCommand
    Command class to join two tables depending on their columns
    InsertCommand
    Command class to insert a row into a table
    NextCommand
    Command class go to next page in paginator
    OpenCommand
    Command class to open a database
    PrevCommand
    Command class to go to previous page in the paginator
    PrintCommand
    Command class to print out a table's contents
    RenameCommand
    Command class to rename a file
    SaveAsCommand
    Command class save the database in a different file
    SaveCommand
    Command class to save the database
    SelectCommand
    Command class to print out results of a check
    ShowTablesCommand
    Command class to show all table names in the database
    UpdateCommand
    Command class to update rows under circumstances
